description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen displaying a landscape image, while the rear is characterized by a geometric, angular back panel and a robust central support column. The monitor is supported by a wide, V-shaped stand that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible buttons or ports on the front, sides, or back. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform black color scheme. No branding or decorative elements are visible on any part of the monitor.
description: A sleek, black flat-screen computer monitor with a slim bezel and a wide V-shaped stand, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's thin profile and the depth of the central support column and V-shaped stand.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the angular back panel, central support column, and the full width of the V-shaped stand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the display and the structure of the stand.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the screen with a landscape image, slim bezel, and the full width of the V-shaped stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with straight edges and sharp corners, providing a modern, unobtrusive frame around the display area. No decorative elements or color contrast are present.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, V-shaped flat base made of black plastic or metal, attached centrally to the back of the monitor, offering stability and a contemporary look. No visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
